title: Colorblind Diamond
description: For people with Protanopia, all Diamond stuff is recolored so it appears closer to how anyone without Colorblindness would see it.
body:
To anyone with Protanopia (A type of Colorblindness) Diamond tools and armor can be easily be mistaken for Iron. This Resourcepack I made recolors all Diamond Items and Blocks so they appear closer to how they would to anyone without Colorblindness.

![With this Pack vs. Without](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2968108eff42af0359030e03aac2b4b4ebea052.jpeg)

I originaly uploaded this on curseforge a few years ago, but after learning that the file loction of certain textures changed in recent versions I've updated it to work on both current and past versions. I also decided to upload it here as I don't really use Curseforge much anymore. If you want to check out the original page, here's a link: [Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/colorblind-diamond)
